title: Private Intent
description: Title slide — Swap any asset. No bridges. No leaks. Colosseum Frontier Hackathon 2026.

title: The Problem
description: Three broken fundamentals: bridge exploits ($2.8B), MEV extraction ($1.3B+), wallet fragmentation (5+ wallets per user).

title: The Solution
description: One intent. Zero bridges. No leaks. Three pillars: Ika dWallet bridgeless custody, Encrypt FHE MEV shield, Solver Race + Anchor Escrow.

title: AI Layer
description: Four AI pillars powered by Claude: Intent Parsing (chain abstraction), Route Optimization, AI Solver Agent (autonomous bidding), Dispute Resolution.

title: Architecture
description: Full transaction flow: Phantom → Ika DKG → Encrypt FHE → Solver Race → Anchor Escrow → Ika MPC native delivery → Settled (~8s).

title: Solver Marketplace
description: Permissionless solver marketplace: anyone can register, earn fees by delivering native tokens. 6 solvers in demo (4 built-in + 2 custom).

title: Private Intent
description: Closing: Swap any asset. No bridges. No leaks. Full tech stack: Ika MPC, Encrypt FHE, Claude AI, Anchor Escrow, Open Solver Registry.
